endpoints.name: GET /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Fetches a specific dashboard.This method requires the monitoring.dashboards.get permission on the specified dashboard. For more information, see Cloud Identity and Access Management (https://cloud.google.com/iam).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Deletes an existing custom dashboard.This method requires the monitoring.dashboards.delete permission on the specified dashboard. For more information, see Cloud Identity and Access Management (https://cloud.google.com/iam).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Replaces an existing custom dashboard with a new definition.This method requires the monitoring.dashboards.update permission on the specified dashboard. For more information, see Cloud Identity and Access Management (https://cloud.google.com/iam).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{name}/location/{location}/prometheus/api/v1/label/{label}/values
endpoints.description: Lists possible values for a given label name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{LABEL}} with a real label. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{name}/location/{location}/prometheus/api/v1/labels
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}/location/{location}/prometheus/api/v1/labels
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{name}/location/{location}/prometheus/api/v1/metadata
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}/location/{location}/prometheus/api/v1/query
endpoints.description: Evaluate a PromQL query at a single point in time.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}/location/{location}/prometheus/api/v1/query_exemplars
endpoints.description: Lists exemplars relevant to a given PromQL query,
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}/location/{location}/prometheus/api/v1/query_range
endpoints.description: Evaluate a PromQL query with start, end time range.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}/location/{location}/prometheus/api/v1/series
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/dashboards
endpoints.description: Lists the existing dashboards.This method requires the monitoring.dashboards.list permission on the specified project. For more information, see Cloud Identity and Access Management (https://cloud.google.com/iam).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/dashboards
endpoints.description: Creates a new custom dashboard. For examples on how you can use this API to create dashboards, see Managing dashboards by API (https://cloud.google.com/monitoring/dashboards/api-dashboard). This method requires the monitoring.dashboards.create permission on the specified project. For more information about permissions, see Cloud Identity and Access Management (https://cloud.google.com/iam).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/projects
endpoints.description: Adds a MonitoredProject with the given project ID to the specified Metrics Scope.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.
